'''AJ Towse''' (born 19 August 2003) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for the [[Leigh Leopards]] in the [[Super League|Betfred SuperLeague]].<ref>{{cite web |title=Knights Squad List |url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/knights-squadlist |access-date=21 October 2022 |website=York RLFC }}</ref>

He formerly played for [[York Knights|York RLFC]] and started his career at amateur Club [[Heworth A.R.L.F.C.|Heworth ARLFC]] as a Junior. Later he represented the North-East Universities 2021 and played in the Universities Origin game<ref>{{cite web |title=Preview: University Rugby League Origin Game |url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/36558/preview-university-rugby-league-origin-game |access-date=13 November 2023 |website=www.rugby-league.com }}</ref> for the North<ref>{{cite web |title=North continue University Rugby League Origin dominance |url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/36566/north-continue-university-rugby-league-origin-dominance |access-date=13 November 2023 |website=www.rugby-league.com }}</ref> in the same year.

He is also a freelance Web Designer and has a degree in Computer Science from [[York St John University|York St. John University]].<ref>{{cite web |title=YCK partnership |url=http://www.yorksj.ac.uk/news/2021/yck-partnership/ |access-date=29 December 2022 |website=York St John University }}</ref>

== Playing career ==
Towse was born in York and is a product of amateur club [[Heworth A.R.L.F.C.|Heworth ARLFC]],<ref>{{cite web |last=Messenger |first=James |date=26 January 2020 |title=York sign young pair on community dual-registration deals |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/york-sign-young-pair-on-community-dual-registration-deals/ |access-date=29 December 2022 |website=LoveRugbyLeague }}</ref> having played Rugby League from the age of 11 and latterly the York City Knights Excel Program, having represented them at U16's.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/18033810.york-city-knights-take-five-youngsters-one-month-trials/ |title=York City Knights take five youngsters on one-month trials |website=York Press |date=4 November 2019 |access-date=14 July 2023}}</ref>

Having made his first Open-Age appearance in a pre-season friendly<ref>{{cite web |last=|date=3 January 2020 |title=Rovers and Knights announce friendly squads |url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/rovers-and-knights-announce-friendly-squads-25749/ |access-date=13 March 2023 |website=Rugby League News }}</ref> for York Knights vs [[Featherstone Rovers]] at the age of 16, he signed a 3 year contract for the seasons 2021 to 2023.<ref>{{cite web |title=AJ Towse – Playing Career – Summary |url=https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/aj-towse/summary.html |access-date=3 April 2023 |website=www.rugbyleagueproject.org}}</ref> He then went on to sign for a fourth year and the 2024 season<ref>{{cite web |title=Top try-scorer AJ Towse has signed a new one-year deal with York Knights |url=https://www.yo1radio.co.uk/news/sport/top-try-scorer-aj-towse-has-signed-a-new-one-year-deal-with-york-knights/ |access-date=13 November 2023 |website=YO1 Radio }}</ref>

=== York City Knights 2021 ===
Towse made his professional debut<ref>{{cite web |date=19 April 2021 |title=Wigan Warriors outclass York City Knights en route to quarter-finals |url=https://www.thetimes.com/article/wigan-warriors-outclass-york-city-knights-en-route-to-quarter-finals-5vj32p8g5 |access-date=13 March 2023 |website=[[The Times]] }}</ref> in April 2021 in York's defeat by [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Challenge Cup]] 3rd Round. 

Later that year he made a second appearance in the Knights' September win over [[London Broncos]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/england-rfl-championship-york-city-knights-vs-london-broncos/2022-06-05/2030267/commentary |access-date=13 March 2023 |website=www.loverugbyleague.com|title=Live Scores }}</ref>

=== Coventry Bears and Rochdale Hornets 2021 (on-loan) ===
During 2021 Towse made 2 loan appearances<ref>{{cite web |title=BEARS ADD AJ TOWSE |url=https://www.coventrybears.com/blog/ltogaxmwln8lcm9qjhx1uh3puwqwiz |access-date=13 March 2023 |website=Coventry Bears |date=13 May 2021 }}</ref> in May 2021 for [[Coventry Bears]], scoring 1 try, and one loan appearance in August for [[Rochdale Hornets]].

=== Leeds Rhinos Reserves 2022 (on-loan) ===
Towse made one appearance on loan for Leeds Rhinos Reserves vs Wigan, before being recalled to play for the Knights.<ref>{{cite web |date=17 March 2022 |title=Rhinos confirm loan signings in reserves squad to face Wigan at Stanningley on Friday |url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-include-three-york-city-knights-players-in-reserves-squad-to-face-wigan-warriors-3616382 |access-date=21 October 2022 |website=www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk }}</ref>

=== York City Knights 2022 ===
2022 saw Towse appear 18 times for the Knights and scoring 8 tries.<ref>{{cite web |title=Towse eager to build on breakthrough year at York Knights |url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/post/towse-eager-to-build-on-breakthrough-year-at-york-knights |website=York RLFC |date=27 January 2023 |access-date=13 July 2023}}</ref>

He scored a brace in games against [[Newcastle Thunder]],<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/20074178.york-city-knights-third-38-6-win-newcastle/ |title=York City Knights up to third after 38–6 win over Newcastle |website=York Press |date=16 April 2022 |access-date=14 July 2023}}</ref> [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven RLFC]]<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/20238406.coach-hails-outstanding-commitment-winger-aj-towse/ |title=Coach hails 'outstanding commitment' of winger AJ Towse |website=York Press |date=27 June 2022 |access-date=14 July 2023}}</ref> and [[London Broncos]],<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/20188304.york-city-knights-beat-london-broncos-36-34-thriller/ |title=York City Knights beat London Broncos 36–34 in a thriller |website=York Press |date=5 June 2022 |access-date=14 July 2023}}</ref> but it was his acrobatic try against [[Batley Bulldogs]] live on [[Premier Sports]] that will be remembered most.

During the Rugby League World Cup, Towse also spent several days training with the New Zealand National team.<ref>{{cite web |title=Towse & Harrison train with the Kiwis! |url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/post/towse-harrison-train-with-the-kiwis |website=York RLFC |date=21 October 2022 |access-date=13 July 2023}}</ref>

=== York Knights 2023 ===
2023 saw Towse as the only ever-present player completing all 34 League and Cup games, scoring 20 tries in the process, including a hat-trick against London<ref>{{cite web |title=Knights win a thriller beating London 30–28 with AJ Towse grabbing a hat trick to help the grab 2 points – York Knights RLFC |url=https://www.yo1radio.co.uk/podcasts1/yo1-local-sport-york-knights-rlfc/episode/knights-win-a-thriller-beating-london-30-28-with-aj-towse-grabbing-a-hat-trick-to-help-the-grab-2-points/ |access-date=13 November 2023 |website=YO1 Radio }}</ref> and helping the side reach the play-offs for the second successive year. 

=== York Knights 2024 ===
Towse signed a further contract ahead of the 2024 season, ending with 13 appearances and 7 tries<ref>{{cite web |last=media3035 |date=16 October 2023 |title=Top try-scorer Towse re-signs with the Knights |url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/post/top-try-scorer-towse-re-signs-with-the-knights |access-date=13 November 2023 |website=York RLFC }}</ref>

=== Leigh Leopards 2025 ===
As announced in Oct 2024, Towse signed a 3 year contract to join the Leigh Leopards ahead of the 2025 season. He played 4 times, scoring 3 tries against Salford and Huddersfield  <ref>{{Cite web |title=Leopards Sign – AJ Towse!!! – Leigh Leopards |url=https://leighleopards.co.uk/leopards-sign-aj-towse/ |access-date=2024-10-16 |language=en-US}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date=16 Oct 2024|website=BBC Sport|title=Leigh sign Towse from York for 2025|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c1e857wqn2go|language=en-UK}}</ref>

===Widnes Vikings (loan)===
On 21 May 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=21 May 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Leigh Leopards starlet makes Championship switch as loan length confirmed|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leigh-leopards-starlet-makes-championship-switch-as-loan-length-confirmed}}</ref>

=== Leigh Leopards 2026 ===
So far, Towse played games against York, Huddersfield, Hull KR and Hull FC, scoring three tries.

== Honours ==
2021 – North East Universities

2021 – Universities Origin final.<ref>{{cite news |date=17 December 2021 |title=York City Knights' AJ Towse to feature in University Origin |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/19792875.york-city-knights-aj-towse-feature-university-origin/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref>

2022 – Rugby League [[RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]] Young Player of the Year nomination.<ref>{{cite news |date=13 September 2022 |title=York City Knights youngster AJ Towse shortlisted for young player of the year |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/21396825.york-city-knights-ace-shortlisted-young-player-year/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref>

2022 – York City Knights Young Player of the Year. 

2022 – York City Knights Try of the Year.<ref>{{cite news |date=10 October 2022 |title=Jordan Thompson and Tara-Jane Stanley win player of the year awards for Knights |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/23037380.end-season-awards-given-york-city-knights/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref>

2023 – York Sport Awards Student Sportsperson of the Year.<ref>{{cite news |date=21 April 2023 |title=York's sporting heroes celebrated at top awards ceremony |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/news/23470946.city-sporting-heroes-celebrated-york-sports-awards-ceremony/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Home |url=https://yorksportsawards.co.uk/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Sports Awards }}</ref>

2023 – York Knights Supporters Society Player of the year.<ref>{{cite news |date=22 September 2023 |title=York Knights ace has 'improved massively' after being named KSS Player of the Year |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/yorkcityknights/23807388.kss-player-year-aj-towse-improved-massively-says-boss/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref>

2023 – York Knights Young Player of the Year

2023 – York Knights Top Try Scorer.<ref>{{cite news |date=16 October 2023 |title=York Knights' top-scorer signs new one-year deal to remain at club |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/yorkcityknights/23859387.york-knights-top-scorer-aj-towse-signs-new-one-year-deal/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref>

2023 – Rugby League [[RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]] Young Player of the Year nomination.<ref>{{cite news |date=28 September 2023 |title=York Knights head coach and star nominated for Championship awards |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/yorkcityknights/23819650.york-knights-head-coach-star-nominated-championship-awards/ |access-date=14 November 2023 |website=York Press }}</ref>
